message:
feat: add dependency closure planner, expand metrics and reliability subsystems

Enhance the remote compilation helper with smarter dependency analysis
and improved daemon reliability (~2014 insertions):

- rch-common/dependency_closure_planner.rs: new module for computing
  minimal transitive dependency closures before shipping compilation
  units to remote workers, reducing unnecessary file transfers
- rch/hook.rs: refine client-side hook integration for pre/post
  compilation event handling
- rchd/metrics: expand daemon metrics collection with new counters
  for compilation latency, cache hit rates, and worker utilization
- rchd/process_triage.rs: improve process triage logic for better
  worker health assessment and task routing decisions
- rchd/reliability.rs: add retry strategies, circuit breaker patterns,
  and graceful degradation for transient worker failures
- rchd/selection.rs: enhance worker selection algorithm with
  load-aware and locality-aware scheduling heuristics
- Update beads issue tracker with current task status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
